title: Owning the stage: Look past Live Nation's legal troubles to see a growing, high-margin venue business
summary: Live Nation's stock may be undervalued as legal challenges subside, with potential to capture more fan revenue through its high-margin venue business. Investors may be overlooking the company's growth prospects once freed from legal overhang.
content: Live Nation's stock hasn't caught up to the possibility that the company, once freed from its legal overhang, can capture more fan dollars.

zh.title: 掌控舞台：忽视Live Nation的法律问题，看其不断增长的高利润场馆业务
zh.summary: 随着法律挑战消退，Live Nation的股票可能被低估，有潜力通过其高利润场馆业务捕获更多粉丝收入。投资者可能忽视了该公司在摆脱法律阴影后的增长前景。

title: OpenAI announces GPT-5.5, its latest artificial intelligence model
summary: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.5, an advanced AI model with enhanced capabilities in coding, computer interaction, and advanced research tasks. The release represents continued progress in OpenAI's competitive AI development.
content: The model is better at coding, using computers and pursuing deeper research capabilities, OpenAI says.

zh.title: OpenAI宣布推出最新人工智能模型GPT-5.5
zh.summary: OpenAI推出了GPT-5.5，一个高级AI模型，在编码、计算机交互和高级研究任务方面具有增强的能力。该版本代表了OpenAI在竞争激烈的AI开发中的持续进展。

title: Trump’s meme coin is down 80% since his first event promoting it. He’s holding another gala for it this weekend.
summary: President Trump's $TRUMP meme coin has lost 80% of its value since initial promotion despite a planned gala this weekend to boost interest. The decline illustrates volatile crypto markets and persistent ethical concerns surrounding Trump's involvement.
content: President Donald Trump plans to host another private event for top holders of his meme coin, but the grand functions aren’t sending the $TRUMP digital token to new highs — and the ethical concerns aren’t going away.

zh.title: 特朗普的迷因币自首次推广活动以来下跌80%。他本周末将举办另一场盛会为其造势。
zh.summary: 特朗普总统的$TRUMP迷因币自首次推广以来已失去80%的价值，尽管计划本周末举办盛会以提振兴趣。这种下跌说明了加密货币市场的波动性以及围绕特朗普参与的持久伦理问题。

title: As Americans turn to blue-collar jobs for stability, here’s which ones offer the most security — and which offer the least
summary: College affordability and technology layoffs are driving renewed interest in skilled trades as workers seek stability, but blue-collar jobs offer varying security levels and remain vulnerable to broader market disruptions. The trend reflects shifting workforce priorities amid economic uncertainty.
content: College affordability issues and tech layoffs have boosted interest in the skilled trades, but “blue-collar work isn’t necessarily insulated from other market forces.”

zh.title: 当美国人转向蓝领工作寻求稳定时，哪些工作最安全，哪些最不安全
zh.summary: 大学学费承受能力和科技行业裁员正在推动人们对技术贸易的重新关注，因为工人们寻求稳定，但蓝领工作提供的安全水平各不相同，仍然容易受到更广泛的市场干扰的影响。这种趋势反映了在经济不确定性中劳动力优先事项的转变。

title: Microsoft plans first-ever voluntary employee buyout for up to 7% of U.S. workforce
summary: Microsoft is offering its first-ever voluntary buyout program to U.S. employees at senior director level and below whose age and tenure combined total 70 or more years. The initiative reflects efforts to reshape workforce composition during economic uncertainty.
content: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.

zh.title: 微软计划对最多占美国员工7%的员工提供首个自愿离职补偿方案
zh.summary: 微软向高级总监及以下级别的美国员工提供首个自愿离职补偿计划，这些员工的年龄和任职年限加起来达到70年或更长。这一举措反映了公司在经济不确定性下改变员工结构的努力。

title: Texas Instruments' stock jumps 18%, heads for best day since 2000 as AI demand soars
summary: Texas Instruments' stock surged 18% to its best day since 2000 after beating earnings and revenue targets with optimistic guidance. The gain reflects strong semiconductor demand driven by accelerating artificial intelligence adoption.
content: Texas Instruments beat on earnings and revenue and gave upbeat guidance.

zh.title: 德州仪器股票上涨18%，创2000年以来最佳单日表现，AI需求飙升
zh.summary: 德州仪器股票在超过收益和收入目标并给出乐观指引后上涨18%，创造了自2000年以来最好的单日表现。这一涨幅反映了由人工智能加速采用推动的强劲半导体需求。

title: Spirit Airlines lawyer says cash 'not going to last for very much longer,' but government rescue on the table
summary: Spirit Airlines warned that available cash is depleting rapidly but confirmed negotiations with the Trump administration on a potential government rescue package. The talks signal federal willingness to consider intervention for the troubled airline.
content: Spirit Airlines confirmed it is in talks with the Trump administration for a rescue package.

zh.title: 美联航律师称现金"不会坚持太久"，但政府救援方案在谈判中
zh.summary: 美国精神航空公司警告可用现金正在快速耗尽，但证实正在与特朗普政府就潜在救援方案进行谈判。这些谈判表明联邦政府愿意考虑对这家陷入困境的航空公司进行干预。

title: Overlooked industrial Dover gets the market's attention with a strong first quarter
summary: Industrial conglomerate Dover reported strong first-quarter results, prompting analyst upgrades and raised price targets. The company's diversified portfolio—including fuel pumps and data center components—is gaining renewed market recognition.
content: We're raising our price target on the industrial conglomerate, which makes everything from gas pumps to data center components.

zh.title: 被忽视的工业公司Dover以强劲的第一季度获得市场关注
zh.summary: 工业集团Dover报告了强劲的第一季度业绩，促使分析师上调评级和目标价格。该公司多元化的投资组合——包括燃油泵和数据中心组件——获得了市场的重新认可。

title: This once defensive stalwart has been a roller coaster in 2026. The charts are now improving
summary: A traditionally defensive stock has experienced substantial volatility in 2026, declining more than 60% from November 2024 peaks due to fundamental challenges and a significant unspecified event, though recent technical charts show improving patterns. The decline illustrates how defensive names can face major headwinds.
content: Shares have tumbled over 60% from their November 2024 highs driven by fundamentals but also marked by an unthinkable shock.

zh.title: 这只曾经的防守型龙头股在2026年成为了过山车。图表现在正在改善
zh.summary: 一只传统防守型股票在2026年经历了大幅波动，由于基本面挑战和一个重大事件，从2024年11月的高点下跌超过60%，尽管近期技术图表显示改善的迹象。这次下跌说明了防守型股票如何会面临重大逆风。

title: White House warns of 'industrial-scale' efforts in China to rip off U.S. AI tech
summary: The White House has warned of "industrial-scale" Chinese efforts to steal U.S. artificial intelligence technology and intellectual property. The alert reflects escalating concerns about technology competition and security between the two countries.
content: The U.S. government has previously accused China of targeting American AI technology and intellectual property.

zh.title: 白宫警告中国"工业规模"窃取美国人工智能技术
zh.summary: 白宫已警告中国进行"工业规模"的美国人工智能技术和知识产权盗窃行为。这一警告反映了两国之间关于技术竞争和安全的担忧不断升级。

title: Brent oil tops $104 per barrel on unconfirmed report Iran's top negotiator resigned
summary: Brent crude oil prices rose above $104 per barrel following reports of Iran's top negotiator resigning, amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions. Energy markets remain sensitive to geopolitical developments affecting Middle Eastern supply relationships.
content: Oil prices are rising again as tensions escalate in the U.S.-Iran conflict.

zh.title: 伊朗高级谈判代表辞职传闻，布伦特油价突破每桶104美元
zh.summary: 伊朗高级谈判代表辞职的报道传出后，布伦特原油价格上升至每桶104美元以上，美伊紧张局势不断升级。能源市场对影响中东供应关系的地缘政治发展保持敏感。

title: Investors are worried about private credit’s close ties to software stocks. So, why is money flooding into these ETFs?
summary: Despite investor concerns about private credit funds' heavy exposure to software stocks, billions of dollars continue flowing into these ETFs, highlighting the disconnect between yield-seeking demand and risk awareness. The trend reveals investor hesitation competing with the appeal of higher returns.
content: Some investors are shunning private-credit funds, but billions of dollars are still flowing into funds with a big software exposure.

zh.title: 投资者担忧私募信贷与软件股票紧密相联，资金为何仍源源不断涌入这些ETF？
zh.summary: 尽管投资者对私募信贷基金对软件股票的大量敞口感到担忧，但数十亿美元仍在源源不断地流入这些ETF，这突显了追求收益的需求与风险意识之间的脱节。这一趋势表明投资者的谨慎态度正与更高回报的吸引力相竞争。

title: ‘The Lord has taken care of me’: I’m 74. I went from earning $14 an hour to retiring with $3.4 million. Here’s how I did it.
summary: A 74-year-old retiree accumulated $3.4 million through disciplined saving while earning only $14 per hour, demonstrating how modest income combined with consistent financial habits can generate substantial wealth over decades. The success story illustrates the power of sustained savings discipline.
content: “I have always thought that I did not have any real talents or skills.”

zh.title: "上帝照顾了我"：我74岁了。我从每小时赚14美元发展到以340万美元退休。我是这样做到的。
zh.summary: 一位74岁的退休者通过纪律严明的储蓄积累了340万美元，尽管每小时只赚14美元，这说明了适度收入加上持续的财务习惯如何能在几十年中产生可观的财富。这个成功故事说明了坚持储蓄纪律的力量。

title: Tesla is in a no-win situation as it faces the ire of its earliest customers
summary: Tesla plans to replace older vehicle computers in an initiative that analysts have questioned as potentially inefficient and costly. The replacement strategy has generated frustration among early customers regarding the company's long-term vehicle support commitment.
content: The company plans to replace old vehicle computers in a plan that one analyst said  seemed “expensive and perhaps not even sensible.”

zh.title: 特斯拉陷入两难之地，面临最早期客户的愤怒
zh.summary: 特斯拉计划更换旧车的计算机，这一举措受到分析师质疑，可能效率低下且成本高昂。这一更换策略在早期客户中引发了对公司长期车辆支持承诺的不满。

title: High street drug dealer sells cannabis to undercover reporter
summary: Across the United Kingdom, criminal networks are exploiting legitimate retail storefronts to distribute illegal drugs on a growing scale. The trend highlights how commercial locations are being infiltrated for large-scale drug trafficking operations.
content: Across the UK, shopfronts are being exploited by criminal gangs pushing illegal drugs, experts say.

zh.title: 高街毒品贩子向卧底记者贩卖大麻
zh.summary: 在整个英国，犯罪网络正在利用合法零售店面以越来越大的规模分销非法毒品。这一趋势突显了商业地点如何被渗透进行大规模贩毒行动。

title: This chipmaker is set to rally after a strong earnings report and guidance, says BofA
summary: BofA upgraded a semiconductor company to buy rating following strong earnings and guidance, signaling confidence in its near-term performance. The upgrade from neutral positioning reflects positive momentum in the chipmaker sector.
content: The bank's research arm raised its rating on the semiconductor name to buy from neutral.

zh.title: 美银看好芯片制造商强劲财报和指导后的上涨
zh.summary: 美银在强劲财报和指导后将一家半导体公司升级至买入评级，表明其对近期表现充满信心。该升级从中性评级反映出芯片制造商板块的正面势头。

title: Why it’s the luckiest U.S. stock market in history, according to one strategist
summary: A strategist argues the U.S. stock market benefits from exceptionally favorable conditions, with easy financial conditions and AI-driven growth offsetting geopolitical tensions and trade pressures. This confluence of tailwinds makes current market dynamics historically favorable.
content: Financial conditions are easy and the AI boom is driving the economy forward, despite war, tariffs and other headwinds, says this strategist

zh.title: 为什么美国股市是历史上最幸运的？策略师这样认为
zh.summary: 一位策略师表示，美国股市受益于极其有利的条件，宽松的金融环境和人工智能驱动的增长抵消了地缘政治紧张和贸易压力。这些顺利因素的汇聚使当前市场动态呈现历史上少有的优势。

title: Trump's net approval rating on economy and overall falls to lowest of his two terms, CNBC survey shows
summary: CNBC's latest survey shows President Trump's approval ratings, both overall and on economic issues, have hit record lows for his tenure. The decline reflects public sentiment on his administration's performance.
content: President Donald Trump's overall — and economic — approval ratings plunged in the latest CNBC All-America Economic Survey.

zh.title: 特朗普经济和整体认可度跌至两任期以来最低，CNBC调查显示
zh.summary: CNBC最新调查显示，总统特朗普的认可度（包括整体和经济方面）已创任期以来的历史新低。这一下降反映了公众对其政府表现的评价。

title: Oil giant BP suffers shareholder revolt over climate transparency at tense AGM
summary: BP faced shareholder opposition at its annual meeting, failing to pass motions that would have allowed the company to reduce climate-related disclosures. The revolt signals investor concerns about the company's environmental transparency commitments.
content: Oil giant BP failed to get two motions passed, one of which would've permitted retiring two company climate disclosure obligations.

zh.title: 石油巨头BP在紧张的年会上因气候透明度问题遭股东反抗
zh.summary: BP在年度股东大会上面临股东反对,未能通过允许公司减少气候相关披露的议案。这场反抗表明投资者对该公司环境透明度承诺的担忧。

title: LVMH CEO Arnault warns of 'world catastrophe' if Middle East conflict is not resolved
summary: LVMH's CEO warns that an unresolved Middle East conflict poses severe global economic risks, citing significant impacts on luxury goods sales in the first quarter. The warning underscores how geopolitical tensions are directly affecting major industries.
content: Arnault warned of "very serious" economic consequences of the Iran war after the conflict hit the luxury conglomerates first-quarter sales last week.

zh.title: 路易威登CEO阿尔诺警告称如果中东冲突未解决将导致"世界灾难"
zh.summary: 路易威登首席执行官警告称,未解决的中东冲突对全球经济构成严重风险,并指出这对奢侈品销售造成了重大影响。这一警告强调了地缘政治紧张局势如何直接影响重大产业。

title: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
summary: U.S. homebuilders face rising costs as building material suppliers have increased prices across multiple product categories due to Middle East conflict disruptions. These price hikes threaten to increase construction costs and potentially impact new home affordability.
content: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.

zh.title: 伊朗战争如何影响美国房屋建筑商
zh.summary: 美国房屋建筑商面临成本上升,因为建筑材料供应商因中东冲突中断而提高了多个产品类别的价格。这些价格上涨威胁到建筑成本增加,可能影响新房的可负担性。

title: Avis’s stock has its worst day in 28 years, and what that means for its parabolic rally
summary: Avis Budget experienced its worst trading day in nearly three decades, with technical indicators signaling a potential reversal of its recent dramatic rally. The sharp decline raises questions about the sustainability of the stock's parabolic run.
content: Avis Budget’s stock chart just sent some bearish signals to suggest a hard landing is in the works.

zh.title: 安飞士股票迎来28年来最糟糕的一天，这对其抛物线上涨意味着什么
zh.summary: 安飞士预算公司经历了近三十年来最糟糕的交易日，技术指标显示其近期戏剧性上涨可能出现反转。急剧下跌引发了对该股票抛物线式上涨可持续性的质疑。

title: French weather forecasting office files police complaint following suspicious Polymarket bets
summary: France's meteorological office filed a police complaint after suspicious betting activity on Polymarket, following unusual temperature fluctuations recorded at Paris's main airport. The incident raises concerns about potential market manipulation tied to weather data anomalies.
content: Temperature readings at Charles de Gaulle International Airport rose by a few degrees in a matter of minutes .

zh.title: 法国气象局在Polymarket可疑赌注后提出警方投诉
zh.summary: 法国气象部门在Polymarket出现可疑博彩活动后提出了警方投诉，此前巴黎主要机场记录了异常的温度波动。该事件引发了人们对潜在市场操纵与天气数据异常相关的担忧。

title: S&P 500 futures decline following another record-setting day for benchmark: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock index futures declined after the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite reached new all-time highs during Wednesday's session. The pullback follows continued strength in major benchmarks.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rallied to new closing records on Wednesday afternoon.

zh.title: 标普500指数期货在基准创下又一个创纪录交易日后下跌：实时更新
zh.summary: 在标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数在周三交易时段创下历史新高后，美国股指期货下跌。这次回调跟随着主要基准指数的持续强势。

title: Amex cardholders are loading up on luxury goods and premium airfares, as spending growth picks up
summary: American Express reported 10% spending growth in Q1, driven by increased purchases of luxury goods and premium airfare among its cardholders. The uptick signals growing consumer confidence and willingness to spend on higher-value items.
content: American Express books 10% spending growth in the first quarter.

zh.title: 美国运通持卡人增加奢侈品和高端机票消费，支出增长加速
zh.summary: 美国运通报告第一季度支出增长10%，主要由持卡人对奢侈品和高端机票购买的增加推动。这种增长表明消费者信心上升，消费者更愿意购买高价值商品。

title: Honeywell’s stock drops as sales miss confirms fears of Middle East shipping disruptions
summary: Honeywell's stock fell after missing sales expectations for the third consecutive quarter, with Middle East shipping disruptions contributing to the shortfall. The repeated misses underscore widening supply chain challenges across industrial sectors.
content: Honeywell’s sales missed expectations for a third straight quarter, as the Middle East conflict resulted in shipping disruptions.

zh.title: 霍尼韦尔股票下跌，销售未达预期证实中东海运中断担忧
zh.summary: 霍尼韦尔股票在连续第三个季度未达销售预期后下跌，中东海运中断导致短缺。这些重复的未达预期强调了工业部门日益扩大的供应链挑战。

title: Americans cut spending due to higher gas prices and see no relief in sight, CNBC survey finds
summary: CNBC's survey shows Americans are reducing spending in response to gasoline prices exceeding $4 per gallon, up over 30% since late February military actions. Consumer sentiment reflects concerns about sustained fuel costs with limited relief expected.
content: Pump prices have surged more than 30% to top $4 per gallon since the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28

zh.title: 美国人因油价上升削减支出，CNBC调查显示没有缓解迹象
zh.summary: CNBC的调查显示，美国人正在减少支出以应对汽油价格超过每加仑4美元，自2月底军事行动以来上升超过30%。消费者情绪反映了对持续燃油成本的担忧，预计缓解空间有限。

title: ‘I hope to retire at 59’: I have $950,000 in my 401(k)s. When do I do a Roth conversion?
summary: A personal finance column addresses a reader's question about timing Roth conversions for early retirement at age 59, emphasizing the permanence of such conversions. The guidance highlights the importance of careful planning when moving retirement funds.
content: Roth conversions are permanent. Once done, they cannot be undone.

zh.title: "我希望在59岁退休":我的401(k)账户中有$950,000。我何时进行罗斯转换?
zh.summary: 一篇个人理财专栏回答了读者关于59岁提前退休时罗斯转换时机的问题,强调了此类转换的永久性。该指导强调了在转移退休资金时仔细规划的重要性。

title: American Airlines cuts 2026 earnings projections after surge in jet fuel
summary: American Airlines reduced its 2026 earnings guidance due to soaring jet fuel costs adding billions in unexpected expenses, following similar actions by other carriers. The downgrade reflects deteriorating near-term profitability across the airline industry.
content: American Airlines cut its 2026 earnings forecast, becoming the latest airline to lower its outlook after a surge in fuel costs added billions to its expenses.

zh.title: 美国航空公司在喷气燃料飙升后下调2026年收益预期
zh.summary: 美国航空公司由于喷气燃料成本飙升导致意外增加数十亿美元的成本,下调了其2026年收益指引,其他航空公司也采取了类似行动。该下调反映了航空业近期盈利能力的恶化。

title: 'CAR' crash: Avis Budget stock plunge reminding some on Wall Street of GameStop
summary: Avis Budget's stock (ticker CAR) crashed after soaring nearly nine-fold from under $100 to close to $850 in a matter of weeks, drawing comparisons to the GameStop volatility bubble. The dramatic reversal echoes concerns about speculative bubbles in retail-driven stock surges.
content: Shares of Avis Budget Group, ticker 'CAR,' soared from under $100 last month to a record high near $850 in early trading Wednesday before a sharp U-turn lower intraday.

zh.title: "CAR"暴跌:Avis Budget股票暴跌让华尔街一些人想起了游戏驿站
zh.summary: Avis Budget股票(代码CAR)在数周内从不到$100飙升至接近$850后暴跌,与GameStop波动性泡沫相提并论。这种戏剧性的逆转引发了对零售驱动股票涨幅中投机泡沫的担忧。

title: Government borrowing falls by £20bn in year to March
summary: Government borrowing fell by £20 billion in the year to March as increased tax receipts outweighed higher spending. The decline signals improved fiscal performance and strengthens the government's budgetary position.
content: An increase in spending is more than more than offset by increased tax receipts, official figures show.

zh.title: 政府借贷在三月年度内下降200亿英镑
zh.summary: 政府借贷在一年内下降了200亿英镑，因为增加的税收收入超过了更高的支出。这一下降反映了财政表现的改善，加强了政府的预算地位。

title: Justin Trudeau tells CNBC that international organizations may no longer be fit for purpose
summary: Canadian PM Trudeau told CNBC that existing international organizations may be inadequate for modern challenges, calling instead for "microlateralism" where small groups of countries coordinate on shared interests. The statement signals potential restructuring of global diplomatic frameworks.
content: Trudeau reiterated Ottawa's call for world leaders to unite and adopt "microlateralism" where a small group of countries identify shared interests.

zh.title: 特鲁多告诉CNBC国际组织可能不再适合其目的
zh.summary: 加拿大总理特鲁多向CNBC表示，现有国际组织可能不足以应对现代挑战，他呼吁采取"小多边主义"的方式，即小国集团在共同利益上进行协调。这一声明预示着全球外交框架可能的重组。

title: European stocks to open in negative territory as oil prices gain
summary: European stocks are expected to open lower on Thursday as regional market sentiment declines and oil prices gain. The combination of rising energy costs and weakening investor sentiment adds pressure to continental equity valuations.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Thursday as regional market sentiment declines.

zh.title: 欧洲股票在油价上涨的情况下将在负值区域开盘
zh.summary: 由于地区市场情绪下降和油价上升，欧洲股票预计在周四开低。能源成本上升和投资者情绪走弱的结合给欧洲股票估值增加了压力。

title: Watch: BBC goes undercover at mini-mart selling drugs
summary: BBC UK editor Ed Thomas confronted a shopkeeper secretly filmed selling cannabis and cocaine to a BBC researcher. The investigation exposes how retail storefronts are being exploited for illegal drug distribution.
content: BBC UK editor Ed Thomas confronts a shopkeeper secretly filmed selling cannabis and cocaine to one of our researchers.

zh.title: 观看：BBC卧底调查迷你超市贩毒
zh.summary: BBC英国编辑埃德·托马斯对峙了一位被秘密录像的店主，该店主向BBC研究员销售大麻和可卡因。该调查曝光了零售店面如何被利用于非法毒品销售。

title: High Street mini-marts selling cocaine, cannabis and prescription drugs, BBC secret filming reveals
summary: BBC investigation reveals that UK High Street mini-marts are being exploited by criminal gangs to distribute cocaine, cannabis, and prescription drugs. Experts attribute the widespread issue to organized networks targeting retail locations for drug sales.
content: Across the UK, shopfronts are being exploited by criminal gangs pushing illegal drugs, experts say.

zh.title: BBC秘密拍摄揭示：英国高街迷你超市销售可卡因、大麻和处方药
zh.summary: BBC调查显示，英国高街的迷你超市被犯罪团伙利用来销售可卡因、大麻和处方药。专家将这一广泛问题归因于有组织的网络针对零售地点进行毒品销售。

title: FICO’s stock falls as Fannie and Freddie deal the credit-score company a new blow
summary: FICO's stock declined as government-backed mortgage entities Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac adopt a competing credit scoring system. The development threatens FICO's longstanding dominance in the credit scoring market.
content: The government-backed entities are embracing a rival type of credit score.

zh.title: 房利美和房地美为信用评分公司致命一击，FICO股价下跌
zh.summary: 随着政府支持的抵押贷款实体房利美和房地美采用竞争性的信用评分系统，FICO股价下跌。这一发展威胁到FICO在信用评分市场上的长期主导地位。

title: Kalshi suspends, fines 3 congressional candidates in 'insider trading' enforcement actions
summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi suspended and fined three congressional candidates from Virginia, Minnesota, and Texas for insider trading violations. The enforcement actions highlight concerns about elected officials potentially using non-public information for trading advantage.
content: The incidents involved a candidate from Virginia seeking a Senate seat and candidates running for House seats from Minnesota and Texas.

zh.title: Kalshi暂停并罚款3名国会候选人的"内幕交易"执法行动
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Kalshi暂停并罚款来自弗吉尼亚州、明尼苏达州和德克萨斯州的三名国会候选人，理由是违反内幕交易规定。这些执法行动突出了对当选官员可能利用非公开信息进行交易以获得优势的担忧。

title: Tesla misses on revenue but beats on profit as auto margins jump
summary: Tesla reported lower-than-expected revenue but beat profit estimates as automotive margins expanded significantly. Despite strong profitability, the stock has underperformed peers as global EV competition intensifies.
content: Tesla's stock has underperformed all of its megacap peers so far this year as global competition ramps up in the electric vehicle market.

zh.title: 特斯拉收入未达预期但利润超预期，汽车毛利率提升
zh.summary: 特斯拉报告的收入低于预期，但利润超过预期估计，汽车毛利率大幅扩大。尽管盈利能力强劲，但由于全球电动汽车竞争加剧，该股票的表现不及同行。

title: Microsoft looked at buying Cursor before SpaceX deal, sources say
summary: Microsoft considered acquiring AI coding startup Cursor before SpaceX's announced purchase agreement, according to sources. The competing interest underscores strong demand among tech giants for AI-powered developer tools.
content: Prior to SpaceX's announcement that it's agreed to a potential purchase of Cursor, Microsoft looked at buying the AI coding startup.

zh.title: 消息人士称微软在SpaceX交易前曾考虑收购Cursor
zh.summary: 据消息人士透露，微软在SpaceX宣布购买协议之前曾考虑收购AI编程创业公司Cursor。这种竞争性利益强调了科技巨头对AI驱动开发工具的强烈需求。

title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit record highs as Iran ceasefire extension lifts sentiment
summary: A Trump administration ceasefire extension with Iran buoyed investor sentiment, sending U.S. stocks higher and setting up positive opens across Asia. Japan and South Korea markets hit record highs as risk sentiment improved. This matters because geopolitical tensions directly impact market performance and investor confidence in global stability.
content: Investors found some relief after Trump prolonged a ceasefire with Iran, sending U.S. stocks higher and setting up a positive open across Asia.

zh.title: 日本、韩国股市创历史新高，伊朗停火延期提振市场情绪
zh.summary: 特朗普政府与伊朗停火协议延期提振了投资者情绪，美国股市走高，为亚洲市场带来利好开盘。日本和韩国市场因风险情绪改善创下历史新高。这很重要，因为地缘政治紧张局势直接影响市场表现和投资者对全球稳定性的信心。

title: Why ServiceNow’s stock is sliding in the wake of earnings
summary: ServiceNow's stock declined following its earnings report, with investors concerned about the company's margin forecasts. The software company's financial guidance raised questions among market participants. This reflects investor wariness about profitability trajectories in the competitive software market.
content: Investors may be taking issue with various elements of the software company’s margin forecast.

zh.title: ServiceNow股票在财报后下滑的原因
zh.summary: ServiceNow在发布财报后股价下跌，投资者对该公司的利润率预测表示担忧。该软件公司的财务指引引起了市场参与者的疑虑。这反映了投资者对竞争激烈的软件市场中盈利能力轨迹的担忧。

title: IBM’s stock falls as software revenue underwhelms
summary: IBM's stock declined as investors expressed concerns about the company's software business performance amid broader worries about artificial intelligence's impact on the sector. The software revenue disappointed market expectations. This highlights investor anxiety about AI disruption in traditional software and consulting businesses.
content: Investors have been concerned about AI’s impact on IBM’s software and consulting businesses.

zh.title: IBM软件收入不达预期，股价下跌
zh.summary: IBM股价下跌，投资者对该公司软件业务表现表示担忧，同时对人工智能对该行业的影响存在更广泛的担忧。软件收入未达市场预期。这突出了投资者对人工智能在传统软件和咨询业务中造成颠覆的担忧。

title: Lululemon is getting a Nike veteran as its new CEO. An analyst says that could be a problem.
summary: Yoga-wear maker Lululemon appointed Nike veteran Heidi O'Neill as its new CEO, but analysts questioned whether the move was prudent given Nike's current struggles. The appointment raises uncertainty about whether challenges at Nike could follow her to Lululemon. This matters because leadership transitions, especially from struggling companies, can signal execution risks.
content: Yoga-wear maker Lululemon on Wednesday said its board had approved Nike veteran Heidi O’Neill as its new CEO. But analysts said it was too early to tell if that was the right call, and said questions about Nike’s current struggles could spill over into her new job.

zh.title: 露露柠檬聘请耐克资深人士担任新任首席执行官。分析师表示这可能是个问题。
zh.summary: 瑜伽服装制造商露露柠檬任命耐克资深人士海蒂·奥尼尔为新任首席执行官，但分析师质疑这一举措是否明智，考虑到耐克目前的困境。这一任命引发了对耐克的挑战是否会随之来到露露柠檬的担忧。这很重要，因为领导力交接，特别是来自陷入困境企业的交接，可能预示着执行风险。

title: Meta is tracking employee keystrokes on Google, LinkedIn, Wikipedia as part of AI training initiative
summary: Meta is monitoring employee keystrokes and mouse clicks on platforms like Google, LinkedIn, and Wikipedia as part of an AI training initiative. The surveillance program raises privacy and employment concerns among staff. This highlights ongoing tensions between corporate AI development needs and employee privacy rights.
content: As part of an AI initiative that tracks employee keystrokes and mouse clicks, Meta is monitoring use of popular sites like Google, LinkedIn and Wikipedia.

zh.title: Meta正在跟踪员工在谷歌、LinkedIn、维基百科上的按键输入，作为AI培训计划的一部分
zh.summary: Meta正在监控员工在谷歌、LinkedIn和维基百科等平台上的按键输入和鼠标点击，作为AI培训计划的一部分。这个监控程序在员工中引起了隐私和就业问题的关注。这突出了企业AI发展需求与员工隐私权之间的持续紧张关系。

title: CSX says more businesses are shipping via rail to avoid surging fuel costs
summary: Railroad giant CSX raised its full-year sales outlook after reporting that more businesses are switching to rail transport to reduce fuel expenses following Iran-related geopolitical tensions. The shift indicates cost-conscious logistics decision-making by corporations. This matters because transportation mode selection reflects broader economic optimization trends amid energy price volatility.
content: Shares of CSX jumped after hours on Wednesday after the railroad giant raised its sales outlook for the year, as more businesses choose rail to save on fuel costs in the wake of the Iran war.

zh.title: CSX表示更多企业正在通过铁路运输来避免飙升的燃油成本
zh.summary: 铁路巨头CSX在报告更多企业由于伊朗相关地缘政治紧张局势而转向铁路运输以减少燃料开支后，提高了全年销售前景。这种转变表明企业在物流决策中更加成本意识强。这很重要，因为运输方式选择反映了在能源价格波动中更广泛的经济优化趋势。

title: Step aside Tesla, BYD: Japanese carmakers deepen their hold on India's auto market with hybrids
summary: Japanese automakers are strengthening their position in India's third-largest auto market through hybrid technology, where demand is outpacing electric vehicles. Tesla and BYD face competition as consumers favor hybrids over pure EVs in India. This reflects regional preference variations in vehicle powertrains and the competitive dynamics of emerging automotive markets.
content: In the world's third-largest auto market, demand for hybrid cars is racing ahead of EVs, deepening the hold of Japanese carmakers in India.

zh.title: 让开特斯拉和比亚迪：日本车企用混动技术深化在印度汽车市场的地位
zh.summary: 日本汽车制造商通过混合动力技术强化了在印度第三大汽车市场的地位，该市场混动车需求超过电动汽车。特斯拉和比亚迪面临竞争，因为印度消费者更倾向于混动车而非纯电动车。这反映了不同地区对车辆动力系统的偏好差异，以及新兴汽车市场的竞争格局。

title: SK Hynix posts record first-quarter profit, in line with estimates as memory prices climb
summary: Memory chip manufacturer SK Hynix posted record first-quarter profit and revenue as prices for its products surge amid strong artificial intelligence demand. The company's performance aligns with analyst expectations. This highlights the significant economic benefits chipmakers are capturing from the AI boom.
content: SK Hynix posted yet another quarter of record profit and revenue, as prices for its products continue to surge amid strong AI demand.

zh.title: SK海力士第一季度利润创新高，符合预期，内存价格上升
zh.summary: 内存芯片制造商SK海力士在人工智能需求强劲的驱动下，发布了创纪录的第一季度利润和收入，其产品价格大幅上升。公司业绩与分析师预期一致。这突显了芯片制造商从AI热潮中获得的巨大经济利益。
